conversation_log.summary: Task aligns with frontend architecture: route in src/routes/ (TanStack Router file-based routing), data fetching via TanStack Query + oRPC client (no direct fetch), MUI components for rendering (ADR-008), sx prop only (no raw CSS/inline styles), i18n via useTranslation (react-i18next), translation keys in src/locales/en/common.json. Navigation link addition to NavigationMenu.tsx is consistent with existing layout component structure. No architectural changes required.

Rejected AC10 and AC11. AC10: 'JSX text content' and 'hard-coded English string literals' were ambiguous — unclear whether aria-label, label= props, or comments counted. AC11: npm run build does not emit missing-key errors for react-i18next (silent runtime fallback), and no i18n linting step is currently configured, giving no executable verification path.

Revised AC10 to restrict the check to 'direct JSX children' (text nodes between JSX tags), explicitly excluding attribute props such as aria-label and label=. Revised AC11 to use a component test that renders the employee route with the real en/common.json loaded and asserts no rendered text contains a raw translation key (namespace.key pattern) — replacing the non-executable npm run build verification.

Re-approved after AC10/AC11 revision. All 12 criteria remain fully consistent with documented architecture: routing (ADR-007), data fetching (TanStack Query + oRPC, no direct fetch), MUI components (ADR-008), styling (sx prop only), i18n (all rendered text via t() calls, keys verified via component test with real en/common.json per testing.md), component tests (ADR-011, Vitest + Testing Library + custom render with all providers), navigation (NavigationMenu.tsx). No architectural changes required.

All 12 acceptance criteria approved as testable. AC1-AC3, AC7-AC9, AC12 are binary static checks (grep/file existence/tsc --noEmit). AC4-AC6 are binary component tests using Vitest + Testing Library + custom render wrapper (QueryClientProvider, RouterProvider, ThemeProvider, I18nextProvider with real en/common.json). AC10 is binary via static grep/AST check or component test for direct JSX children only (attribute props excluded). AC11 is binary via component test with real locale file, asserting no namespace.key pattern in output — consistent with testing.md custom render pattern.

Cannot implement: dependency tasks #57 (backend oRPC endpoint for employees) and #61 (employees database table migration) were both open and unmerged. The contracts package had no listEmployees procedure or employee Zod schemas — without the contract types, employee.tsx could not use the oRPC client type-safely (AC3) and would fail TypeScript compilation (AC12). Blocked pending resolution of both dependency PRs.

Resuming after developer block comment. Both Architect and Tester approvals for the revised criteria are already logged. No criteria changes were made. Finalizing task: status set to ready_for_development, label updated to agent:developer.

Implemented /employee frontend route with TanStack Router createFileRoute('/employee'), useQuery + orpc.listEmployees(), MUI Table rendering, loading/error/empty states, full i18n via useTranslation('common'). Also fixed i18n.ts to register 'common' namespace (previously unconfigured), updated test/setup.ts for 'common' namespace, added nav.employees key to common.json, and added /employee link to NavigationMenu.tsx. PR #68 opened.

All 17 tests passing across 11 acceptance criteria verified (AC1 verified structurally via import; AC12 verified by tsc --noEmit with zero errors). Static checks (AC2, AC3, AC7, AC8, AC9) confirm correct file structure and no forbidden patterns. Component tests (AC4, AC5, AC6) confirm correct rendering with mocked oRPC responses. AC10 confirmed no plain string literals as direct JSX children. AC11 confirmed all translation keys resolve to real strings from en/common.json. TypeScript compilation passes with zero errors.

decisions.approach: TanStack Router file-based route at /employee. Data fetching via TanStack Query useQuery with orpc.listEmployees() (no input arguments — procedure has no input schema). MUI Table components for rendering. All text via useTranslation('common'). Styling via sx prop exclusively.
risks: French locale for employee keys falls back to English (no fr/common.json). Out of scope per task.
routeTree.gen.ts is auto-generated and gitignored — TanStack Router must be run (npm run dev or build) for the route to register in the router tree.
i18n 'common' namespace was not registered in i18n.ts before this task — fixed as part of implementation to ensure NavigationMenu and employee route work correctly.
